nasb.text: Judah did evil in the sight of the Lord, and they provoked Him to jealousy more than all that their fathers had done, with the sins which they committed.

esv.text: And Judah did what was evil in the sight of the Lord, and they provoked him to jealousy with their sins that they committed, more than all that their fathers had done.

cnv.text: 猶大人行耶和華看為惡的事；他們所犯的罪，惹動他的妒忿比他們的列祖更厲害。

ccb.text: 犹大人做耶和华视为恶的事，他们的罪行比他们祖先所做的更惹耶和华发怒。
